case_title: RONILO DE GUZMAN VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-13-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PENDING APPEAL TO THE SF RENT BOARD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2016 HELD AND CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-11-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT THROUGH REPRESENTATIVE MICHAEL SAUSE--PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED TAGALOG INTERPRETER FOR CONTINUED TRIAL ON JUL-11-2016. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND P. NATT; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE GUZMAN, RONILO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,376.69 FILED BY DE GUZMAN, RONILO AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-30-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. AWAITING RESULT OF RENT BOARD HEARING. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF RONILO DE GUZMAN AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVES MICHAEL SAUSE & SAVATORE RUSSO. MESSRS. SAUSE & RUSSO ARE THE PROPERTY MANAGER AND ASSOCIATE DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, RESPECTIVELY FOR THE TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION. LARRY PICHAY WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS TAGALOG SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MR. DE GUZMAN. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 - SERVED DEC-01-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
